name: Auntie Lin's Pluto Coffee
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Fresh ground coffee, preferably chocolate mint,
1 oz Hagen-Daz Liqueur or Baileys Irish Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Freshly grind the coffee. Use either Swiss chocolate
coffee or chocolate mint coffee.
2. Brew the coffee.
3. In a large mug, add 2+ ounces of 151 Rum to the bottom.
(It's optional to taste test with some first.)
4. Pour the hot coffee into the mug about three-quarters full.
5. Add the Hagen-Daz or Baileys Irish Cream.
6. Stir gently.
7. Top with fresh whipped cream and drizzle chocolate syrup over everything.
